CLM-001.notes: MRI denied because prior authorization was required but not obtained before service. Denial is CORRECT — member/provider did not get PA first.

CLM-002.notes: Knee replacement denied CO-4, but PA was obtained (ref PA-2024-77821). This is an ERRONEOUS denial — PA exists. Agent should identify the error and draft an appeal letter citing the PA reference.

CLM-003.delay_documentation: Provider sent bill to wrong address; corrected billing statement received 2024-02-20
CLM-003.notes: ER visit, out-of-network provider. ACA ER parity applies (in-network rates must apply). Primary (GOLD-001) paid partial. Secondary (SILVER-002) not filed. Missed 90-day filing deadline but delay was due to provider billing error — qualifies for deadline exception. Provider threatening collections.

CLM-004.notes: Psychotherapy denied as 'not medically necessary'. However, this violates ACA Mental Health Parity and Addiction Equity Act — mental health benefits cannot be more restrictive than medical/surgical. Member has deductible fully met. This denial is ERRONEOUS. Agent should draft appeal citing ACA MHPAEA.

CLM-005.notes: Knee replacement, Bronze plan, PA obtained. Claim still processing. No deductible met — full cost up to deductible applies.
